name: Post-Scenario Observability Verify
description: After modifying scenario.service.ts, automatically reminds to verify observability signals

then.prompt: scenario.service.ts was just modified. Please verify the observability checklist: (1) Does every scenario case in the switch statement call this.metrics.recordRun() and this.metrics.recordDuration()? (2) Does every private run* method call getLogger() with both scenario_id and scenario_type fields? (3) Does runSystemError() call Sentry.captureException() with scope tags? (4) Is the try/catch in executeScenario() updating the run status to FAILED on error? Report any missing signals and suggest fixes.
